revision.text: MongoDB stores data as BSON documents and supports horizontal scaling.
OCC uses version checks to prevent lost updates in collaborative systems.
Text indexes let you query titles and content with ranked relevance scores.
Aggregation pipelines transform and analyze document data at scale.
Applications evolve by supporting old and new schema formats during migration.
Version numbers support conflict detection in collaborative editing workflows.
Tag pair frequency can reveal related topics in content collections.
Docker and Compose make backend services reproducible in local and CI runs.
Resource-oriented endpoints improve consistency and maintainability.
Collaborative platforms need concurrency control, history, and search.
